member.name: T:CL.StorageS3.Events.ObjectUploadedEvent
member.summary: Published when an object has been successfully uploaded to S3.

member.name: M:CL.StorageS3.Events.ObjectUploadedEvent.#ctor(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.Int64,System.DateTime)
member.summary: Published when an object has been successfully uploaded to S3.

member.name: T:CL.StorageS3.Events.ObjectDeletedEvent
member.summary: Published when an object has been successfully deleted from S3.

member.name: M:CL.StorageS3.Events.ObjectDeletedEvent.#ctor(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.DateTime)
member.summary: Published when an object has been successfully deleted from S3.

member.name: T:CL.StorageS3.Events.BucketCreatedEvent
member.summary: Published when a new bucket has been successfully created.

member.name: M:CL.StorageS3.Events.BucketCreatedEvent.#ctor(System.String,System.String,System.DateTime)
member.summary: Published when a new bucket has been successfully created.

member.name: T:CL.StorageS3.Models.StorageS3Config
member.summary: Main configuration model for the CL.StorageS3 library. Serialized as config.storages3.json in the library's config directory.

member.name: P:CL.StorageS3.Models.StorageS3Config.Enabled
member.summary: Whether the StorageS3 library is enabled.

member.name: P:CL.StorageS3.Models.StorageS3Config.Connections
member.summary: One or more S3/MinIO connection configurations.

member.name: T:CL.StorageS3.Models.S3ConnectionConfig
member.summary: Configuration for a single S3 or S3-compatible (MinIO, etc.) connection.

member.name: P:CL.StorageS3.Models.S3ConnectionConfig.ConnectionId
member.summary: Unique identifier for this connection. Used to look it up via the connection manager.

member.name: P:CL.StorageS3.Models.S3ConnectionConfig.AccessKey
member.summary: AWS / MinIO access key ID.

member.name: P:CL.StorageS3.Models.S3ConnectionConfig.SecretKey
member.summary: AWS / MinIO secret access key.

member.name: P:CL.StorageS3.Models.S3ConnectionConfig.ServiceUrl
member.summary: S3 service endpoint URL. Use https://s3.amazonaws.com for AWS or a MinIO URL such as http://localhost:9000.

member.name: P:CL.StorageS3.Models.S3ConnectionConfig.PublicUrl
member.summary: Public-facing base URL used to build object URLs, e.g. https://cdn.example.com. When empty, object public URLs are not generated.

member.name: P:CL.StorageS3.Models.S3ConnectionConfig.Region
member.summary: AWS region name (e.g. us-east-1). Defaults to us-east-1.

member.name: P:CL.StorageS3.Models.S3ConnectionConfig.DefaultBucket
member.summary: Default bucket name used when no bucket is specified in an operation.

member.name: P:CL.StorageS3.Models.S3ConnectionConfig.ForcePathStyle
member.summary: Whether to use path-style addressing (http://host/bucket/key instead of http://bucket.host/key). Required for MinIO and most non-AWS S3-compatible services.

member.name: P:CL.StorageS3.Models.S3ConnectionConfig.UseHttps
member.summary: Whether to use HTTPS for the connection.

member.name: P:CL.StorageS3.Models.S3ConnectionConfig.TimeoutSeconds
member.summary: HTTP request timeout in seconds.

member.name: P:CL.StorageS3.Models.S3ConnectionConfig.MaxRetries
member.summary: Maximum number of retry attempts on transient failures.

member.name: M:CL.StorageS3.Models.S3ConnectionConfig.BuildClient
member.summary: Builds and returns a configured for this connection.

member.name: M:CL.StorageS3.Models.S3ConnectionConfig.IsValid
member.summary: Returns when all required fields have values.

member.name: T:CL.StorageS3.Models.S3ObjectInfo
member.summary: Represents metadata and identity information about an S3 object.

member.name: P:CL.StorageS3.Models.S3ObjectInfo.Key
member.summary: The object key (path within the bucket).

member.name: P:CL.StorageS3.Models.S3ObjectInfo.BucketName
member.summary: The bucket containing this object.

member.name: P:CL.StorageS3.Models.S3ObjectInfo.Size
member.summary: Size of the object in bytes.

member.name: P:CL.StorageS3.Models.S3ObjectInfo.LastModified
member.summary: UTC timestamp of when the object was last modified.

member.name: P:CL.StorageS3.Models.S3ObjectInfo.ETag
member.summary: Entity tag (MD5 hash or multipart identifier) of the object.

member.name: P:CL.StorageS3.Models.S3ObjectInfo.StorageClass
member.summary: S3 storage class (e.g. STANDARD, INTELLIGENT_TIERING).

member.name: P:CL.StorageS3.Models.S3ObjectInfo.ContentType
member.summary: MIME content type of the object.

member.name: P:CL.StorageS3.Models.S3ObjectInfo.Metadata
member.summary: User-defined metadata key/value pairs attached to the object.

member.name: P:CL.StorageS3.Models.S3ObjectInfo.PublicUrl
member.summary: Public-facing URL for this object (when configured via PublicUrl).

member.name: M:CL.StorageS3.Models.S3ObjectInfo.FromS3Object(Amazon.S3.Model.S3Object)
member.summary: Creates an from an returned by list operations.

member.name: M:CL.StorageS3.Models.S3ObjectInfo.FromMetadata(System.String,System.String,Amazon.S3.Model.GetObjectMetadataResponse)
member.summary: Creates an from a .

member.name: T:CL.StorageS3.Models.BucketInfo
member.summary: Represents information about an S3 bucket.

member.name: P:CL.StorageS3.Models.BucketInfo.Name
member.summary: Bucket name.

member.name: P:CL.StorageS3.Models.BucketInfo.CreationDate
member.summary: UTC timestamp when the bucket was created.

member.name: P:CL.StorageS3.Models.BucketInfo.Region
member.summary: AWS region the bucket resides in (may be empty for non-AWS providers).

member.name: M:CL.StorageS3.Models.BucketInfo.FromS3Bucket(Amazon.S3.Model.S3Bucket)
member.summary: Creates a from an descriptor.

member.name: T:CL.StorageS3.Models.ListObjectsResult
member.summary: Result of a paginated list-objects operation.

member.name: P:CL.StorageS3.Models.ListObjectsResult.Objects
member.summary: Objects returned in this page.

member.name: P:CL.StorageS3.Models.ListObjectsResult.NextContinuationToken
member.summary: Continuation token to pass to retrieve the next page, or when exhausted.

member.name: P:CL.StorageS3.Models.ListObjectsResult.IsTruncated
member.summary: Whether more results exist beyond this page.

member.name: P:CL.StorageS3.Models.ListObjectsResult.CommonPrefixes
member.summary: Common key prefixes returned when a delimiter is specified (virtual folders).

member.name: P:CL.StorageS3.Models.ListObjectsResult.Count
member.summary: Number of objects in .

member.name: T:CL.StorageS3.Models.UploadOptions
member.summary: Options that control how an object is uploaded to S3.

member.name: P:CL.StorageS3.Models.UploadOptions.ContentType
member.summary: MIME content type (e.g. image/jpeg). Leave empty to omit.

member.name: P:CL.StorageS3.Models.UploadOptions.Metadata
member.summary: User-defined metadata key/value pairs to attach to the object.

member.name: P:CL.StorageS3.Models.UploadOptions.StorageClass
member.summary: S3 storage class (e.g. STANDARD, REDUCED_REDUNDANCY). Leave empty for default.

member.name: P:CL.StorageS3.Models.UploadOptions.CacheControl
member.summary: HTTP Cache-Control header value. Leave empty to omit.

member.name: P:CL.StorageS3.Models.UploadOptions.ContentDisposition
member.summary: HTTP Content-Disposition header value. Leave empty to omit.

member.name: P:CL.StorageS3.Models.UploadOptions.MakePublic
member.summary: Whether to set the object ACL to public-read.

member.name: M:CL.StorageS3.Models.UploadOptions.Default
member.summary: Returns a default with no overrides.

member.name: T:CL.StorageS3.Models.DownloadOptions
member.summary: Options that control how an object is downloaded from S3.

member.name: P:CL.StorageS3.Models.DownloadOptions.RangeStart
member.summary: Byte offset at which to start the download (for range requests). Null means start of object.

member.name: P:CL.StorageS3.Models.DownloadOptions.RangeEnd
member.summary: Byte offset at which to end the download (inclusive, for range requests). Null means end of object.

member.name: P:CL.StorageS3.Models.DownloadOptions.VersionId
member.summary: Version ID to retrieve a specific object version. Null retrieves the current version.

member.name: M:CL.StorageS3.Models.DownloadOptions.Default
member.summary: Returns a default with no overrides.

member.name: T:CL.StorageS3.Services.S3ConnectionManager
member.summary: Manages a cache of instances keyed by connection ID. Thread-safe via a simple lock.

member.name: M:CL.StorageS3.Services.S3ConnectionManager.#ctor(CodeLogic.Core.Logging.ILogger)
member.summary: Initializes a new .

member.name: M:CL.StorageS3.Services.S3ConnectionManager.RegisterConfiguration(CL.StorageS3.Models.S3ConnectionConfig)
member.summary: Registers a connection configuration. Replaces any existing config with the same .

member.name: M:CL.StorageS3.Services.S3ConnectionManager.GetClient(System.String)
member.summary: Returns a cached (or newly created) for the given connection ID.
member.param: Connection ID to look up. Defaults to "Default".
member.exception: Thrown when no configuration is registered for the given ID.

member.name: M:CL.StorageS3.Services.S3ConnectionManager.TestConnectionAsync(System.String)
member.summary: Tests whether the connection identified by is reachable by performing a lightweight ListBuckets call.
member.param: Connection ID to test. Defaults to "Default".
member.returns: when the call succeeds; on error.

member.name: M:CL.StorageS3.Services.S3ConnectionManager.GetConfiguration(System.String)
member.summary: Returns the registered under , or when not found.

member.name: M:CL.StorageS3.Services.S3ConnectionManager.GetConnectionIds
member.summary: Returns all registered connection IDs.

member.name: T:CL.StorageS3.Services.S3StorageService
member.summary: High-level S3 storage service providing full CRUD operations over buckets and objects. All methods return or — exceptions are caught and wrapped.

member.name: M:CL.StorageS3.Services.S3StorageService.#ctor(CL.StorageS3.Services.S3ConnectionManager,System.String,CodeLogic.Core.Logging.ILogger,CodeLogic.Core.Events.IEventBus)
member.summary: Initializes a new .
member.param: The connection manager that owns the underlying client.
Connection ID to use. Defaults to "Default".
Optional event bus for publishing domain events.

member.name: M:CL.StorageS3.Services.S3StorageService.CreateBucketAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Creates a new bucket.

member.name: M:CL.StorageS3.Services.S3StorageService.DeleteBucketAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Deletes a bucket.

member.name: M:CL.StorageS3.Services.S3StorageService.ListBucketsAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Lists all buckets accessible to this connection.

member.name: M:CL.StorageS3.Services.S3StorageService.BucketExistsAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Returns when exists and is accessible.

member.name: M:CL.StorageS3.Services.S3StorageService.PutObjectAsync(System.String,System.String,System.Byte[],CL.StorageS3.Models.UploadOptions,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Uploads a byte array as an S3 object.

member.name: M:CL.StorageS3.Services.S3StorageService.PutObjectAsync(System.String,System.String,System.IO.Stream,CL.StorageS3.Models.UploadOptions,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Uploads a stream as an S3 object.

member.name: M:CL.StorageS3.Services.S3StorageService.GetObjectAsync(System.String,System.String,CL.StorageS3.Models.DownloadOptions,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Downloads an S3 object as a byte array.

member.name: M:CL.StorageS3.Services.S3StorageService.GetObjectStreamAsync(System.String,System.String,CL.StorageS3.Models.DownloadOptions,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Downloads an S3 object and returns its response stream.

member.name: M:CL.StorageS3.Services.S3StorageService.GetObjectInfoAsync(System.String,System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Retrieves metadata for an S3 object without downloading its content.

member.name: M:CL.StorageS3.Services.S3StorageService.DeleteObjectAsync(System.String,System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Deletes an S3 object.

member.name: M:CL.StorageS3.Services.S3StorageService.ListObjectsAsync(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.Int32,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Lists objects in a bucket with optional prefix filtering and pagination.
member.param: Pagination token from a previous call.
Maximum number of objects to return per page.

member.name: M:CL.StorageS3.Services.S3StorageService.ObjectExistsAsync(System.String,System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Returns when the object identified by exists in .

member.name: M:CL.StorageS3.Services.S3StorageService.CopyObjectAsync(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Copies an object within or across buckets.

member.name: M:CL.StorageS3.Services.S3StorageService.GeneratePresignedUrlAsync(System.String,System.String,System.TimeSpan,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Generates a pre-signed URL that allows temporary access to a private object.
member.param: How long the URL should remain valid.
Cancellation token (not used by AWS SDK for pre-sign, provided for API consistency).

member.name: T:CL.StorageS3.StorageS3Library
member.summary:
CL.StorageS3 — CodeLogic library providing Amazon S3 and S3-compatible (MinIO, etc.) object storage operations.
Lifecycle:
Configure — registers .
Initialize — loads and validates config, registers all enabled connections in .
Start — no-op.
Stop — disposes and all cached S3 clients.

member.name: P:CL.StorageS3.StorageS3Library.ConnectionManager
member.summary: The underlying connection manager. Use this for low-level client access.
member.exception: Thrown when the library has not been initialized or is disabled.

member.name: M:CL.StorageS3.StorageS3Library.GetService(System.String)
member.summary: Returns a new scoped to the given connection.
member.param: Connection ID to use. Defaults to "Default".

member.name: P:CL.StorageS3.StorageS3Library.DefaultService
member.summary: Returns a new scoped to the "Default" connection.
